CAPP17

Computer Algebra in Particle Physics 2017, 20-24 March 2017, DESY (Hamburg)

Introduction to Differential Equations for Feynman Integrals

Materials for the 90-minute lecture

  • slides.pdf
  • ex1.tar.gz files for Example 1
  • ex2.tar.gz files for Example 2

Software

  • LiteRedV1.82.zip by Roman Lee (homepage)
  • fuchsia.py.gz by OG, Vitaly Magerya (homepage)
